title: platform work script extraction
purpose: D4.2 defines platform work script extraction for the agent-driven expert system. Platform evolution — promotion ladder, parallel queue, reuse.
scope: Owns `D4.2` only; siblings under `D4` must not duplicate this spec.
Aligns with minimal HITL: H1 plan, H2 blocker, H3 sign-off ([INTRO-1.2](INTRO-1.2-human-touchpoint-contract-h1-h2-h3.md)).
Conflicts resolve in favor of [Vision §6 — Branch D — Platform evolution plane (parallel queue)](../../full-automation-vision-and-hierarchy.md#6-branch-d-platform-evolution-plane-parallel-queue).
behavior_steps: On platform drain for script-extraction items, an economy worker promotes stable L1 playbook steps or verified manual commands into idempotent S0 Python under `scripts/` with tests.
The worker wires verify-router when the extracted script replaces a task-card Test command so future implement turns invoke S0 instead of ad-hoc shell.
Playbook diff references the new script path; the conductor enforces [B1.1](B1.1-s0-deterministic-mandatory-first.md)—run the script before the model re-derives the same behavior.

Backwards-compatible behavior changes follow [D5.2](D5.2-extend-backwards-compatible-staleness-bump.md); breaking changes require [D5.3](D5.3-fork-new-catalog-entry-provenance.md) fork with new catalog id and provenance.
If extraction lacks tests, a CLI entry point, or playbook linkage, the queue item stays open and pursuit blocks false L2 promotion at H2.

Concurrent manual edit to queue JSON â€” conductor reloads queue each wake; last writer wins with journal note.
Platform queue depth 0 but product blocked on missing playbook â€” D3.3 priority cut skips platform drain.
Edge case `D4.2` variant 4: verify state dual-write before continuing pursuit.
Pass 3: add regression test or evidence path specific to `D4.2`.
Pass 3: cross-link related nodes in same branch index.
failure_modes: **Silent stop:** Agent ends turn without updating queue â†’ mitigated by /loop + check-hierarchy-queue.py EMPTY gate.
**False complete:** Item marked done without artifact â†’ audit-hierarchy-depth.py re-enqueues deepen pass.
**Scope bleed:** Worker edits journal/state during planning-only expansion â†’ forbidden in vision-expansion-prompt.
**Stale design:** Upstream vision Â§ changes â†’ reconcile-stale adds deepen items for affected ids.
implementation: Scheduler in autopilot workflow: `(steps_total % K) == 0` â†’ platform turn.
playbook-keeper + script extraction skills dequeue promotion items.
Validate `D4.2` against SEC-15 release checklist and parent index links.
Document `D4.2` in parent index with verify command and release tag.
Add checklist row in SEC-15 release doc for `D4.2`.
acceptance: [ ] Named script, skill, or test path exists or is listed in SEC-15 release row
narrative: D4.2 defines platform work script extraction for the agent-driven expert system. Platform evolution — promotion ladder, parallel queue, reuse. In practice, the system on platform drain for script-extraction items, an economy worker promotes stable l1 playbook steps or verified manual commands into idempotent s0 python under `scripts/` with tests, then the worker wires verify-router when the extracted script replaces a task-card test command so future implement turns invoke s0 instead of ad-hoc shell.
reader_narrative:
<!-- prose-source: agent plane-d 2026-06-28 -->

Script extraction promotes L1 playbook steps—or verified manual commands—into S0 Python under `scripts/` with tests. Extraction is platform work: changes tooling for all future goals, not the current consumer feature branch unless explicitly shared.

Extracted scripts must be idempotent, CLI-invokable, and referenced from playbook diff. Wire verify-router when script replaces task-card Test command. Backwards-compatible extensions use [D5.2](D5.2-extend-backwards-compatible-staleness-bump.md); behavior breaks require [D5.3](D5.3-fork-new-catalog-entry-provenance.md) fork with new catalog id. [B1.1](B1.1-s0-deterministic-mandatory-first.md) mandates conductor runs script before model re-derivation.
